Name: Mate's Education Pvt Ltd
Desc:
[

Mates International Education and Visa Services

,

Mate’s Education Pvt. Ltd is one of the pioneer education consultancies of Nepal that helps Nepali students obtain “Admission & Student Visa” to go to different countries, mainly Australia, Canada, UK, and New Zealand. What makes us unique is our ‘equal support’ to those returning to settle back in Nepal by grabbing the new career opportunities or unique business startup ideas. Hence, we are here to help you while going abroad to Learn to Achieve your dream, Earn the Recognition of your successful dignity and even if you wish to Return to Reflect your education, experience, and expertise in Nepal. Abroad Study Plan is not like reading one book or watching one movie or visiting your favorite place for leisure activities. More specifically, it’s not a matter of short span of time.

,

Instead, it’s a matter of your whole life which is based on your one particular ‘action’ that decides ‘what kind of life’ you will live ahead as consequences. In short, Abroad Study Plan is the “The Transition Phase” of your life which is based on your today’s action and that action is – Choosing the right consultancy.

,

There are thousands of education consultancies in the market and most of them were, perhaps, born yesterday. Nothing wrong with that, but if your whole Life is going to depend on that Consultancy and their Counselors, you should always choose the one that has a History, the Experience, The Team and the one that can ‘Assure’ your future in abroad or even when you return to Nepal. Like we said, we are here to assist you go and here to assist you return – as your Guide & as your Mate. But we are here in the whole journey of your lifetime.

,

Mates an educational consultancy, moreover an organization in itself is taken as an epitome in the field of abroad studies. The services rendered by this organization is considered as the reliable one which has made numerous students climb the staircase of Mates.

]

Name: Prime Education Information Center Pvt. Ltd
Desc:
[

Established in 2002, Prime Education Information Center is an education consultancy, committed and dedicated to assist for overall guidance and assistance to the students aspiring to pursue further and higher education abroad. As it is located at one of the prime location, it is easily accessible from any corner in the city. We have a team of certified counsellors and well experienced professionals for admission counselling, documentation, assistance, visa guidance with mock interviews.

,

With a team of well qualified, experienced and dynamic professionals, Prime Education welcomes prospective students for admission information, documentation assistance, and visa application guidance with mock interviews. We represent a well number of esteemed institutions from the USA, Australia, Canada, New Zealand, UK and Thailand.

,

Diligent and helpful team, experienced counselors, personal attention, factual information, honest suggestion, commitment and accountability are our assets which enabled us to win the hearts of our clients. And, we are proud for being a trustworthy name in the field of educational consulting services in Nepal.

,

Prime Education Information Center Pvt. is a member of Educational Consultants Association of Nepal (ECAN) with its membership no. 047/2006/07. This company has been the reliable and meticulous agent of many Universities and Colleges, especially of U.S.A, Canada, U.K., Australia and New Zealand.

,

Besides, it has been working with some other institutions of Germany and Cyprus as well. Prime Education always run behind deeds not behind words, so we work and help the students diligently in such way that they will be eligible to hold the visa of the country they want for and they have their dreams true to have the academic degrees of foreign countries. Our offices are located at different areas, which are fully facilitated with computing resources (Free Internet, well furnishing lab, sound environment); seminar room with necessary equipments (In focus Projector, TV, Video and multimedia); Library and Class rooms.

,

Prime Education Information Center

]

Name: Oli And Associates Pvt. Ltd.
Desc:
[

Established in 2002, Oli & Associates is a complete international education service provider that delivers quality educational services in the global arena. Headquartered in Sydney, Australia, our branches spread across Nepal, Australia and Bhutan.

,

Our committed team at Oli & Associates works tirelessly every day to realise the dreams of hundreds of students. We are excellent at counselling, partnerships, affiliations, and collaborations because of our knowledge and experience in international education.

,

Oli & Associates was founded in 2002 by Mr. Bhabani Prasad Oli in Australia. Oli & Associates is Nepal’s leading trusted education consultancy for study abroad from Nepal. With 24 years of experience, we are a pioneer in promoting study abroad and have helped over 30,000 clients to achieve their dreams of studying abroad and settling in Australia, Canada, the UK, the USA, and New Zealand.

,

Canada is one of the best education destinations for international students. Canada currently hosts around 642000 international students as of September 2020. Canada is home to hundred thousands of students throughout the globe for the following reasons.

,

Your ideal location for incredible living and working opportunities in the world’s largest education system, offering outstanding benefits and a clear path to success. Explore endless options and make your ideal dream job a reality!

,

The UK is well known for its world-class educational system, which includes first-rate facilities, top-notch research, and creative teaching methods. It equips students with the necessary tools and credentials to thrive in the global marketplace and realise their aspirations.

,

With less expensive living and tuition than the USA, UK, Australia, or Canada, New Zealand is becoming a popular choice for students seeking an affordable, high-quality education. Its eight QS-ranked universities provide internationally recognised degrees in a stunning, safe nation with low admission standards.

,

At Oli and Associates, we offer a Comprehensive Education Counseling service that is designed to guide Nepalese students and professionals toward achieving their international academic dreams. As a leading study abroad consultancy in Nepal, we provide personalized education counseling to help you navigate the complex process of pursuing higher education abroad.

,

Our team consists of 155 professionals, including 50 QEAC-certified counselors, who provide expert guidance for studying in Australia, Canada, the UK, the USA, and New Zealand, ensuring your journey to international education is smooth and successful.

,

We’ve helped 50,000+ students score band 8 or higher in IELTS/PTE, maintain strong partnerships with globally recognized universities, and operate offices across Nepal, Australia, and Bhutan for complete support from application to arrival. Name: The Next Education Consultancy Pvt. Ltd
Desc:
[

The Next Education Consultancy has a long-standing reputation for being one of the best educational consultancy in Nepal for studying abroad. Our head office is located at New Baneshwor, Kathmandu, including branches at Putalisadak, Bhairahawa, Birtamode, Parsa, Pokhara, Nawalparasi, Nepalgunj, Butwal, Damak, Narayangarh, Biratnagar, Tandi, Damauli in Nepal. And we have a support office in Sydney and Sri Lanka.

,

The “student assistance team” of Next Consultancy is an experienced agency in background checks of Students eligibility for enrollment.

,

An application assistance team is available to you through The Next Education Consultancy to help you complete the university admission process.

,

My experience with this consultancy has opened the door to my higher studies in Australia. The counselor’s kindness and consistent follow-ups on documentation and interview preparation have been exceptional. I highly recommend this consultancy to any student uncertain about choosing the best support for their studies abroad.
